section.heading: Recordkeeping violations
section.chapeau: It shall be unlawful for any person willfully to fail or refuse—

paragraph.content: to establish or maintain any record required by this chapter or any regulation prescribed under this chapter;
to submit any report, notice, or other information to the United States Government in accordance with this chapter or any regulation prescribed under this chapter; or
to permit access to or copying of any record that is exempt from disclosure under this chapter or any regulation prescribed under this chapter.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act” and was translated as reading “this division”, meaning div. I of Pub. L. 105–277, Oct. 21, 1998, 112 Stat. 2681–856, known as the Chemical Weapons Convention Implementation Act of 1998, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. For complete classification of division I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 6701 of this title and Tables.
